title: GrowthZone OAuth2 Credentials
description: OAuth2 credentials for GrowthZone association management system API. Supports refresh token flow (primary) with password grant fallback.

ClientId.title: Client ID
ClientId.description: OAuth2 client identifier issued by GrowthZone. Available in your GrowthZone application settings.

ClientSecret.title: Client Secret
ClientSecret.description: OAuth2 client secret issued by GrowthZone. Keep this value secure and never share it.

RefreshToken.title: Refresh Token
RefreshToken.description: OAuth2 refresh token for long-term access. Required if Username/Password are not provided. This is the preferred authentication method.

BaseURL.title: Base URL
BaseURL.description: GrowthZone API endpoint URL (e.g., https://myassociation.growthzoneapp.com/api). The OAuth2 token endpoint is derived from this URL's origin.

TokenURL.title: Token URL
TokenURL.description: OAuth2 token endpoint URL. If not specified, defaults to {BaseURL origin}/oauth/token. Only override if your GrowthZone instance uses a non-standard token endpoint.

Username.title: Username
Username.description: Username for password grant authentication. Required if RefreshToken is not provided. Used as fallback when refresh token is not available.

Password.title: Password
Password.description: Password for password grant authentication. Required if RefreshToken is not provided. Used as fallback when refresh token is not available.

Scopes.title: Scopes
Scopes.description: Space-separated OAuth2 scopes requested during authentication (e.g., 'openid profile email'). Used primarily with password grant flow.

Tenant.title: Tenant
Tenant.description: Optional GrowthZone tenant subdomain. If BaseURL is not fully specified, this can be used to construct it as https://{Tenant}.growthzoneapp.com/api.
